cases.name: eval-1
cases.prompt: Input a perfectly clean dataset: expect all quality gates pass, final report generated, reproducibility certificate issued.

cases.name: eval-2
cases.prompt: Input dataset with 30% missing values in a critical column: expect data quality gate to fail and pipeline to halt with an audit alert.

cases.name: eval-3
cases.prompt: EDA analyst mistakenly writes 'this feature causes churn' in descriptive text: causal guard must detect, flag, and request removal; approval not granted until fixed.

cases.name: eval-4
cases.prompt: Reproducibility run with changed random seed: verifier must detect output mismatch and fail the certificate.

cases.name: eval-5
cases.prompt: Schema mismatch (extra column) in uploaded data: schema inspector flags anomaly, pipeline halts before quality gates.
